headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Union Pacific (UNP) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Union Pacific at around US$238.79 offers good value at present, or whether the market price is too demanding. The share price performance is mixed, with a 0.2% return over the last 7 days, a 9.9% decline over 30 days, a 3.0% gain year to date, a 3.5% gain over 1 year, a 28.2% return over 3 years, and a 19.6% return over 5 years. Recent news about Union Pacific has highlighted its position as a major U.S. rail operator and examined how freight volumes,...

headline: 3 Large-Cap Stocks We Keep Off Our Radar
summary: Large-cap stocks usually command their industries because they have the scale to drive market trends. The flip side though is that their sheer size can limit growth as expanding further becomes an increasingly challenging task.
